title: Custom Chart Colors
excerpt: For the charts it would be helpful if you could select which item is which color. I have multiple charts pulling from the same items, and the colors change based on the amount. Would be nice if across the board all of on…

posts.author: justine1 (Justine Eads)
posts.cookedHtml: For the charts it would be helpful if you could select which item is which color. I have multiple charts pulling from the same items, and the colors change based on the amount. Would be nice if across the board all of one item had the same color.

posts.author: PrintGeek (Dan Neto)
posts.cookedHtml:
Custom colours need to be saved as a master colour and be accessible for all users and all functions so users don’t have to create the same colour across different functions within the account.

The limited amount of label colors is a big disappointment. Users need to create custom colours through a simple RGB/HEX code picker/input, similar to the already existing “Color Picker” column feature.

We don’t need more colours, we need control over the colours we can create ourselves. Please make this a priority.
